items.title: Jim Cramer Believes Lawsuits Are No Longer a Major Threat to Johnson & Johnson
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer put under the microscope. Cramer recalled his discussion with the company’s CEO, and commented: “What else might work? Last Friday on the show, we had Joaquin Duato. He’s the CEO of Johnson & Johnson, and he told a remarkable story about game-changing cancer drugs […]
